title: Design Singly Linked List
description: Design a singly linked list supporting: get(index), insertHead(val), insertTail(val), insertAt(index, val), removeAt(index), getValues() → array of all values.
key_concept: Dummy head node simplifies insert/delete at head (no special case). Track length for O(1) bounds checking.

hints.L1: Use a dummy head node pointing to the actual first node. This eliminates special cases for inserting/removing at index 0.
hints.L2: For insertAt(index): traverse to node at index-1. newNode.next = cur.next; cur.next = newNode. For removeAt: cur.next = cur.next.next.
hints.L3: Always traverse starting from dummy head. Count steps carefully — insertAt(0) means inserting after dummy, traversal needs 0 steps.
